items.title: European rates: Pricing disconnect persists – BNY
items.summary: BNY Strategist Geoff Yu argues that European rate markets still discount too many hikes for the European Central Bank (ECB), Bank of England (BoE) and Swiss National Bank (SNB) despite an improvement in global risk senti

items.title: Gold range-bound as US-Iran ceasefire doubts keep markets cautious
items.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) remains range-bound on Thursday as markets closely monitor developments surrounding the fragile ceasefire in the Middle East.
items.title_ko: 미국-이란 휴전 의구심 때문에 금 범위가 제한되어 시장에 주의를 기울입니다.
items.summary_ko: 금 (XAU/USD) 은 목요일에 시장이 중동의 취약한 휴전을 둘러싼 발전을 면밀히 모니터링함에 따라 여전히 범위가 정해져 있습니다.
